title: When religion decides who gets shelter
description: “Aap MUSALMAN hain…society allow nahi karegi”.One sentence. One identity. One instant rejection.For many students who leave their homes in search of education and opportunities, the struggle is not merely academic or financial. Sometimes, the biggest challenge is simply finding a place where they are allowed to exist with dignity. For people like me, Articles 14, 15, 21 and 25 of the Constitution often feel like words confined to textbooks rather than protected rightsA secular country, but are i
